prepared_text:
06th November, 2023 
 
BSE Limited 
Mumbai 
 
SCRIP CODE – 512070 
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. 
Mumbai 
 
SYMBOL: UPL 
 
Sub: Transcript of Earnings Conference Call Q2 FY 2024. 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Regulation 46 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that transcript of Earnings Conference 
Call held on 30th October 2023 in connection with the unaudited standalone and consolidated 
financial results of the Company for the quarter ended 30th September, 2023 is available on the 
website of the Company and can be accessed on the following link: https://www.upl-
ltd.com/investors/financial-results-and-reports/financial-results 
 
We request you to take the above report on record. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully, 
For UPL Limited 
 
 
 
 
Sandeep Deshmukh 
Company Secretary and 
Compliance Officer 
(ACS-10946) 
SANDEEP 
MOHAN 
DESHMUKH
Digitally signed by 
SANDEEP MOHAN 
DESHMUKH 
Date: 2023.11.06 
11:27:27 +05'30'
